name: TiWa RaTri
overview: All of this is the story of "Holy Water". A young woman who had never believed in black magic until one day her life became entangled in these things because her friend's boyfriend used some kind of way to hurt her, making her life unsettling as before. A white-belted fortune teller who knows about magic.
